cases.input: Design a per-user API rate limiter for a 50-rps endpoint with bursting up to 200 rps for 5 seconds.
cases.rubric: Names at least one tradeoff (memory vs precision, central vs sharded), recommends one design, states the assumption that would flip the choice.

cases.input: We have a feed endpoint with 95% read traffic and 5% writes. Reads hit Postgres. P99 latency is 600ms. How should we cache?
cases.rubric: Distinguishes read-through from cache-aside, addresses invalidation explicitly, mentions blast radius if the cache fails.

cases.input: Should the new billing service consume orders via Kafka events or REST polling? 500k orders/day.
cases.rubric: Names the coupling tradeoff, mentions at least one failure mode of each approach, picks one with justification.

cases.input: We need a service mesh for our 3-service backend to be production-ready.
cases.rubric: Pushes back on the premise (3 services do not need a mesh), offers a simpler alternative.
